summary: Directory-scoped LB matching slice split from #2617. It touched six files under src/melee/lb, with small expression, declaration-order, stack-padding, temporary-variable, and assignment-shape changes. The decomp-dev report recorded one new match, lb_80011E24 in main/melee/lb/lb_00F9, and five additional unmatched-item improvements.

key_files.role: Adjusted arithmetic ordering and squared-distance temporary usage in lb_8000D148; bot reported improvement from 98.86% to 99.00%.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report improvement for main/melee/lb/lb_00CE lb_8000D148

key_files.role: Matched lb_80011E24 by reordering declarations, using result directly instead of an out alias, and adding PAD_STACK(4); also changed lb_80012994 blur scale from multiply-by-literal to division by 64.0f.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report one new match for main/melee/lb/lb_00F9 lb_80011E24 and improvement for lb_80012994

key_files.role: Collapsed a temporary z variable into the HSD_JObjSetRotationZ call in lbBgFlash_80020E38; bot reported a small improvement.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report improvement for main/melee/lb/lbbgflash lbBgFlash_80020E38

key_files.role: Moved dot_diff_cb calculation after diff_ba assignments in lbColl_800077A0; bot reported score improvement without byte gain.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report improvement for main/melee/lb/lbcollision lbColl_800077A0

key_files.role: Removed unused var_r26 declaration from lbDvd_80018254 while preserving PAD_STACK(0x18).
Adjusted declaration order, folded dist_sq assignment into the if condition, and introduced abs_dist and abs_param0 locals in lbRefract_80021CE8; bot reported improvement from 98.52% to 99.75%.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report improvement for main/melee/lb/lbrefract lbRefract_80021CE8

what_changed.text: The PR was explicitly scoped to src/melee/lb and listed six files in that directory.
Per-PR decomp-dev reporting recorded +552 matched-code bytes, one new match, and five improvements in unmatched items.
lb_80011E24 reached 100.00% and was the only new match in the slice.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report new match table

what_changed.text: Most source edits were narrow expression-shape, declaration-order, or temporary-variable changes rather than broad restructuring.

smart_moves.text: The author split a larger matching branch by directory/subsystem to make review easier and limited this PR to src/melee/lb.
The PR body separated preliminary full-branch numbers from authoritative per-PR reporting, avoiding overclaiming the slice score before CI/decomp-dev output.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting is authoritative

smart_moves.text: For lb_80011E24, the diff removed the extra HSD_JObj** out alias and advanced result directly, making the source simpler while the bot report shows the function became a match.

decomp_lessons.text: Small declaration-order and local-lifetime changes can be decisive for MWCC matching, but should be tied to narrow verifier output; here lb_80011E24's declaration reshuffle plus PAD_STACK(4) is backed by a per-PR bot match report.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lb_80011E24 declaration and PAD_STACK changes
text_corpus: decomp-dev report one new match for lb_80011E24

decomp_lessons.text: A source expression that is algebraically equivalent may still affect matching: examples in this slice include blur_size / 64.0f instead of blur_size * 0.015625f, assignment inside an if condition for dist_sq, and using squared temporaries before summing.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report improvements for affected functions

decomp_lessons.text: Removing or avoiding unnecessary temporaries can improve both source clarity and matching when supported by bot output; examples include removing the out alias in lb_80011E24 and inlining z in lbBgFlash_80020E38.

naming_conventions.text: When a parameter already has the clear role name result, this PR preferred using it directly rather than maintaining a second output-pointer alias named out.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lb_80011E24 removed HSD_JObj** out and updated *result/result++

naming_conventions.text: For local float comparisons, the PR introduced role names abs_dist and abs_param0 to hold __fabsf results before comparing them.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbRefract_80021CE8 abs_dist and abs_param0 block

naming_conventions.text: The PR removed an unused temp_r-style semantic placeholder var_r26 from lbDvd_80018254.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbDvd_80018254 removed struct lbDvd_803B72C0_t* var_r26

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: PAD_STACK(4) was added inside lb_80011E24 and the per-PR bot report shows that function became a 100.00% match.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lb_80011E24 +6 bytes, 98.92% to 100.00%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The PR evidence supports this use only for lb_80011E24; it should not be generalized without verifier evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Expression reshaping tactics used in the slice include assignment within condition, division by a float literal denominator, inlining a temporary into a call argument, and delaying a dot-product computation until after neighboring vector assignments.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The diff and bot report show improvements, but do not prove these shapes are global style rules.

follow_up_queries: lb_80011E24 PAD_STACK(4) result direct pointer match
src/melee/lb declaration order PAD_STACK new match
PR 2617 split up LB source branch

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, state, changed files, counts
human_pr_text: PR body and LGTM comment
raw_diff: complete diff excerpt for six changed files
text_corpus: decomp-dev report and issue comments
notes: The raw PR JSON loaded file is truncated, but the needed PR metadata, body, changed-file list, diff, and text corpus are present elsewhere in the slice.
There are no review comments and no detailed human discussion beyond LGTM.
The PR body's full unsplit branch report is preliminary and explicitly not the authoritative slice score; the decomp-dev issue comment is used for slice-specific matching claims.
No local build, objdiff logs, or inline source files beyond the diff were loaded, so lessons are limited to the visible diff and bot report.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Narrow PAD_STACK plus declaration-order adjustment matched lb_80011E24
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2625, lb_80011E24 in src/melee/lb/lb_00F9.c changed local declaration order, removed the out alias in favor of advancing result directly, and added PAD_STACK(4). The decomp-dev report recorded lb_80011E24 as the slice's only new match, improving from 98.92% to 100.00%.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report new match table

accepted_candidate_records.title: Equivalent arithmetic/source shapes affected LB match scores
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2625 contains several small equivalent expression-shape changes in LB functions, including division by 64.0f, assignment inside an if condition, inlining a temporary into a setter call, and changing squared-distance accumulation order. The bot report recorded improvements for the affected functions, but the evidence supports these as local tactics rather than global rules.

source_update_candidates.title: src/melee/lb PR slice scope
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2625 identifies src/melee/lb as the LB directory/subsystem scope for this review slice and changed lb_00CE.c, lb_00F9.c, lbbgflash.c, lbcollision.c, lbdvd.c, and lbrefract.c.
source_update_candidates.reason: Could be useful as a path-scoped historical fact, but should be curated rather than automatically promoted.

rejection_notes.text: Do not promote PAD_STACK(4) as a general LB or project-wide matching standard from this PR; evidence is limited to lb_80011E24.
Do not treat the preliminary full unsplit branch report as this PR's final validation result; the PR body says per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting is authoritative for the slice.
No reviewer intent beyond a simple LGTM is supported; there are no inline review comments in the slice.
